title: Pan-Seared Fish with Jamaican Spices
description: A flavorful German-inspired dish featuring pan-seared fish, infused with the warmth of Jamaican spices.
instructions: Season the fish with Jamaican seasoning blend and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the snappy (carrots) to the skillet and sauté for 5 minutes, or until crispy.
Add the garlic to the skillet and sauté for an additional minute.
Add the fish to the skillet and sear for 3-4 minutes on each side, or until cooked through.
Transfer the fish to a baking dish and bake in the preheated oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Serve the fish in a bowl, garnished with monsoon (parsley).
